releases.name: Context Titles 0.3.5

releases.author: BlakeC2010
releases.description:
Initial public release of Context Titles.

Context Titles improves Graph View readability by adding folder context to duplicate note names without renaming files or editing note contents.

Features:

* Duplicate-only graph labels
* Global Graph and Local Graph support
* Parent-folder/path title formatting
* Custom separator
* Include/exclude folder scope
* Live preview in settings
* Display-only behavior

Notes:

* This plugin changes displayed graph labels only.
* It does not rename files.
* It does not edit note contents.
* Graph support relies on graph rendering behavior, so future app updates may require maintenance.
releases.name: Context Titles 0.3.4
